series_metadata.series_description: Files contain Individual Ability to Pay Claim forms, social security numbers, federal tax returns, and financial information on assets of an owner of a underground storage tank facility.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: original in office permanently or file is converted a machine readable format ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records permanently. ; Paper: paper copy in operating area converted into machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable records have been checked quality and completeness, paper copy
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
